name: Claerwen Reservoir Wilderness Walk
terrain: Rough track along reservoir shore, remote
highlights: Cambrian wilderness at the largest Welsh reservoir — silent apart from red kites and curlew.
points_of_interest: Claerwen dam (concrete art deco); Teifi Pools on extended route
viewpoints: Vast open moorland; Pumlumon range on horizon
water_features: Claerwen Reservoir (largest in Wales by volume)
parking_start: Claerwen Dam car park (end of tarmac road)
food_drink_nearby: Elan Valley Visitor Centre café; The Triangle Inn Cwmdauddwr
hazards_notes: Remote; no phone signal; boggy after rain; no facilities past the dam
